events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes concrete placement in progress with honeycomb from missed vibration. This is a sequence/procedure violation - vibration should occur during placement. Honeycomb indicates defective concrete installation. Work should stop, defective area needs rework/repair per ACI 301/304.

    "Honeycomb present in placed concrete due to missed/insufficient vibration during placement",
    "Sequence violation: consolidation (vibration) was not performed concurrently with lift placement as required",
    "Installed concrete is defective and non-compliant with ACI 301/304 consolidation requirements"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop placement in affected area and do not proceed with subsequent lifts/finishing over defective concrete",
    "Inspect and delineate honeycombed areas; determine depth and extent of voids",
    "Submit nonconformance report to EOR for repair/replace disposition before continuing",
    "Correct vibration procedure: ensure vibrators are operating and inserted at proper spacing/depth for remaining and future placements",
    "Execute approved repair (e.g., chipping to sound concrete and bonding/patching) or remove and replace as directed by EOR"
  ],
  "rationale": "Honeycomb from missed vibration indicates consolidation was skipped or improperly sequenced during concrete placement, producing defective in-place concrete. Per ACI 301 and ACI 304, concrete must be properly consolidated during placement; defective areas must be evaluated and repaired/replaced under EOR direction before work continues.",
  "references": ["ACI 301", "ACI 304"]
}
